lines: +  // Label sits off the shaft (rotated away from the radial line, not beyond
+  // the arrowhead), so it never sits under the tip at any angle.
+      x: cx + shaftR * Math.cos(rad) - sideOffset * Math.sin(rad),
+      y: cy - shaftR * Math.sin(rad) - sideOffset * Math.cos(rad)

content.text: Now confirm the text element still uses `probeLabel` with anchor "middle" (already the case), which is fine given the new bounded position.

Good, the text still references `probeLabel.x`/`.y` with `text-anchor="middle"`, which now resolves to a fixed-magnitude point rotated off the shaft line, well clear of the arrowhead at every angle, and comfortably inside the viewBox.

DONE Fixed the probe label collision (Iris V7): the "probe NNN°" label is now placed at a point rotated off the arrow's radial line (mid-shaft plus a perpendicular side offset) instead of beyond the arrowhead, so it never sits under the tip at any angle while staying well within the SVG viewBox.

result:
Good, the text still references `probeLabel.x`/`.y` with `text-anchor="middle"`, which now resolves to a fixed-magnitude point rotated off the shaft line, well clear of the arrowhead at every angle, and comfortably inside the viewBox.

DONE Fixed the probe label collision (Iris V7): the "probe NNN°" label is now placed at a point rotated off the arrow's radial line (mid-shaft plus a perpendicular side offset) instead of beyond the arrowhead, so it never sits under the tip at any angle while staying well within the SVG viewBox.
